input: user-item interactions and user-user social relationships (knowledge graph enhanced)
output: personalized item recommendations (user, movie, or explainable)
backbone: Light Graph Convolutional Network (LGCN), Hyperbolic Recommender (HSR), Knowledge Enhanced Graph Neural Networks (KEGNN)
key_idea: Leverages both user-item interactions and user-user social relationships to address data sparsity and cold start, using knowledge graphs to enhance user embeddings.
